description: Encrypted whistleblower report for Charter Rider violation. G10 STRUCTURAL: encryptedPayloadCid REQUIRED (ADR-2605181100 envelope). G8 STRUCTURAL: surveillanceInvestigativeJournalismAttested const false. Cross-link to chigiri.ipLicenseClaim. Anonymous-attested option via pseudonymous DID per ADR-2605181200.

reporterPseudonymDid.description: 30-day rotating pseudonym DID per ADR-2605181200; reporter privacy preserved

encryptedPayloadCid.description: G10 REQUIRED: ADR-2605181100 encrypted envelope CID containing full report (PII; only Council Lv6+ + chigiri.disputeMediation board can decrypt)

surveillanceInvestigativeJournalismAttes.description: G8 STRUCTURAL: const false; NOT sensationalized exposé-as-surveillance (Charter §2(c) covert-ops avoidance)

sensationalizedFramingAttested.description: G4 STRUCTURAL: const false; no apocalyptic / clickbait framing in whistleblower domain either

chigiriIpLicenseClaimCrossEmitCid.description: Cross-actor chigiri.ipLicenseClaim CID (created upon whistleblower report receipt)

councilReviewCidChain.description: Council review attestation chain (decryption + discernment by Council Lv6+ ≥3)
